title: Create Focused
description: Focused mainly on create. With some extra recipes for one-block
body:
# Create Focused

As the title says, This modpack is very create mod focused with performance and qol mods. Modrinth shows you the mods in the modpack in the versions tab so feel free to check.

**There are also mods like distant horizons and better end and nether to give the world a bit more flavour. Among other mods include : Better capes and Do a barrel roll. As already said, If you want to check the full modpack before installing. Check the version tab.**

 

-**THX for reading btw**. These modpacks take some time to make.
